chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI I. A. No. 04 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of Main Case. (Intimation notice, copy filed, bailiff report still awaited) 07.08.2025. Mr. Manzoor Hussain Khoso, Advocate for Appellant. ________________ Learned counsel for the appellant submits that appellant has expired and his sons have informed him on phone that they are not interested to proceed with this appeal. Therefore, for want of instructions, the appeal is dismissed in non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Nasir/
